response:
Yes we can check how long it took for udp packet to be sent to server like ping but only one direction

To do this we can use the System.Net.Sockets.UdpClient class

We can create a UdpClient instance and send a packet to the server

We can measure the time taken to send the packet using the Stopwatch class

We can then compare the time taken to send the packet with the time taken to receive the packet

This way we can get the one way delay

We can also use the Ping class to get the round trip time

But for one way delay we need to send the packet and measure the time taken to send it

This can be done by creating a UdpClient instance and sending a packet to the server

We can then measure the time taken to send the packet using the Stopwatch class

This will give us the one way delay
